author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Broomhouse Farm 1975 - Questions and Answers
content:
Questions and Answers at Broomhouse Farm - 1975
1975

1 The iconography of Prajnaparamita and the mantra

2 God and Christ and the festival of Christmas

3 Built in faults in the teachings of Christianity

4-9 The decline of Christianity. The Gnostics

5 Teaching Christianity to children

9 "A spiritual movement has to be gloriously irrelevant to the times"

9-12 The FWBO and the media

14 The spiritual tribe

16-18 'Inter-Faith' meetings

19-25 Suggestions for the name of the new Bethnal Green Centre!
